creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Created attachment 236562
Patch to update the port to 2.20.

Maintainer update to 2.20.
(update for cad/calculix will be posted separately.)

AFAICT, 2.20 produces the same results as 2.19 based on a sample of the input files that I've written.

I've replaced the compressed postscript manual with the PDF version to keep up with the times.
